item.title: Body of Missing 56-Year-Old Barbara Lewis Discovered in Grand Bahama Following Intensive Search — Monday, May 25th, 2026
item.ns0:title: Body of Missing 56-Year-Old Barbara Lewis Discovered in Grand Bahama Following Intensive Search — Monday, May 25th, 2026
item.description:
Tonight on Our News, a community in Grand Bahama is left searching for answers after the tragic discovery of a missing woman's body, while police in Eleuthera investigate a separate death involving a man found in coastal waters. We bring you the latest developments on the eight-year-old shooting victim receiving emergency treatment in the US and the national security minister’s stern warning on firearm safety. Our team also looks into the possibility of a new "conch season" following a troubling report on overfishing and details a fresh police alert regarding fraudulent government payment scams. Stay tuned for the full broadcast to catch an inspiring story of youth outreach in our high schools and your complete national weather forecast.
-----
Copyright Disclaimer under section 107 of the Copyright Act of 1976, allowance is made for "fair use" for purposes such as criticism, comment, news reporting, teaching, scholarship, education and research. Fair use is a use permitted by copyright statute that might otherwise be infringing.
item.ns1:encoded:
Tonight on Our News, a community in Grand Bahama is left searching for answers after the tragic discovery of a missing woman's body, while police in Eleuthera investigate a separate death involving a man found in coastal waters. We bring you the latest developments on the eight-year-old shooting victim receiving emergency treatment in the US and the national security minister’s stern warning on firearm safety. Our team also looks into the possibility of a new "conch season" following a troubling report on overfishing and details a fresh police alert regarding fraudulent government payment scams. Stay tuned for the full broadcast to catch an inspiring story of youth outreach in our high schools and your complete national weather forecast.
-----

item.ns0:summary:
Tonight on Our News, a community in Grand Bahama is left searching for answers after the tragic discovery of a missing woman's body, while police in Eleuthera investigate a separate death involving a man found in coastal waters. We bring you the latest developments on the eight-year-old shooting victim receiving emergency treatment in the US and the national security minister’s stern warning on firearm safety. Our team also looks into the possibility of a new "conch season" following a troubling report on overfishing and details a fresh police alert regarding fraudulent government payment scams. Stay tuned for the full broadcast to catch an inspiring story of youth outreach in our high schools and your complete national weather forecast.

item.ns0:author: Our News Bahamas
